name: LiveRamp Holdings, Inc.
summary: LiveRamp Holdings, Inc. ("LiveRamp", "we", "us", or the "Company") is a leading data collaboration technology company, empowering marketers and media owners to deliver and measure marketing performance everywhere it matters. LiveRamps data collaboration network seamlessly unites data across advertisers, platforms, publishers, data providers, and commerce media networks unlocking deep insights, delivering transformational consumer experiences, and driving measurable growth.
